hindi: न तातो न माता न बन्धुर्न दाता,
english: I have no father, no mother, no relative, no giver
roman: Na tato na mata na bandhurna data

hindi: न पुत्रो न पुत्री न भृत्यो न भर्ता।
english: No son, no daughter, no servant, no husband
roman: Na putro na putri na bhrityo na bharta

hindi: न जाया न विद्या न वृत्तिर्ममैव,
english: No wife, no knowledge, no occupation of my own
roman: Na jaya na vidya na vritti mamaiva

english: You are my refuge, you are my refuge, you alone O Bhavani
Fearful in the unfathomable ocean of existence, full of great sorrow
I have fallen, full of desire, greed and delusion
Always bound by the noose of bad worldly existence
You are my refuge, you are my refuge, you alone O Bhavani

hindi: न मोक्षस्य वाञ्छा न मे भक्तिवाञ्छा,
english: I desire neither liberation nor devotion
roman: Na mokshaya vanchha na me bhakti vanchha

english: In this strangely afflicted world of suffering
You O compassionate one give this always
roman: Idam tvam dayalur dadasi ti nityam

english: You are my refuge, you are my refuge, you alone O Bhavani
